content.claim: Hungary tracks students earlier than the OECD average, with 85% of students in schools that select by academic performance, compared to the OECD average of 43%
content.context: Fresh live research through the International comparison lens
limitations: Based on cross-sectional comparison without controlling for confounding institutional factors
Selection rate may reflect both formal policy and de facto practice differently across countries
Does not measure outcomes of this early selection, only prevalence
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
